name: 콘텐츠 마이닝 C.02 - AI UGC 4K 극사실 리뷰영상 v4

parameters.formTitle: AI UGC 4K 극사실 리뷰영상 생성 C.02 v4
parameters.formDescription: FlowPilot AI UGC 4K Hyper-Realistic Review Video Generator v4

values.placeholder: 예: 제주 편백수 92%, 미스트 타입, 보습+진정

parameters.description: Use this tool to think step-by-step about complex decisions. Think about: 1) Which segment_type is best for each scene, 2) How to make prompts hyper-realistic with visible pores, skin texture, and natural imperfections, 3) Whether the video flow feels natural and engaging, 4) Camera angles and lighting that maximize realism. Always think before generating prompts.

parameters.name: hyper_realistic_prompt_generator
parameters.description: Call this tool to generate hyper-realistic 4K video/image prompts. Input: a JSON object with fields 'segment_type' (TALKING/BROLL_PRODUCT/BROLL_INTERACTION/BROLL_LIFESTYLE), 'scene_description' (what happens in the scene), 'product_name' (product name), 'product_category' (product category). Output: a complete hyper-realistic prompt with camera specs, skin texture details, and anti-AI keywords. ALWAYS call this tool for EVERY segment to ensure maximum realism quality.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'suno/v4.5', input: { prompt: $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json['BGM 분위기'] === '잔잔한' ? 'gentle ambient Korean beauty commercial background music, soft piano and ethereal strings, warm and inviting mood, 30 seconds, no vocals, subtle and minimal' : $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json['BGM 분위기'] === '신나는' ? 'upbeat bright Korean beauty commercial music, cheerful acoustic guitar and light percussion, energetic positive mood, 30 seconds, no vocals' : 'emotional cinematic Korean beauty music, solo piano with soft violin, intimate and touching mood, 30 seconds, no vocals', duration: 30 } }) }}

parameters.name: ={{ $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json['브랜드명'] + '_' + $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json['제품명'] + '_' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '_AI_UGC_4K.mp4' }}
